strengths: 16+ years of hands-on engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure — meets the experience floor
Active involvement in AI-agent infrastructure and MCP framework tooling at re:cinq signals timely pivot toward AI platform work
Founder and open-source author with demonstrated ability to independently build and ship products (GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts, Trial)
concerns: No advanced degree (Master's or PhD) in an AI-related field; educational background is a BS in Computer Science and a Fine Arts degree
AI involvement is recent and implementation-level — there is no track record of strategic AI advisory, platform architecture at scale, or influencing org-level AI direction
Career trajectory sits at Staff/Senior IC level with no evidence of director-level scope, executive partnership, or external thought leadership expected for this role
response.justification: Bogdan brings genuine technical range and a credible recent entry into AI tooling, but the role demands a director-level IC who has shaped AI strategy, advised enterprise customers, and built or led cloud/AI platforms at scale. His profile is that of a strong hands-on engineer and maker, not a strategic principal capable of advising C-suite partners or setting technical direction across an organization. The gap between his current seniority and the expectations of this role is significant.
